name: GIGABYTE X870 AORUS ELITE X3D ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8800(O.C.) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C (DP1.4a Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE X870 AORUS ELITE X3D ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Premium AM5 ATX motherboard with X3D support, dual USB4, DDR5-8800, and Wi-Fi 7 for advanced users.
